name: Aurelia Metals Limited
analysis: AMI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3100, stop A$0.2525, target A$0.3550 (0.78:1) — then trail it.
